'''Debeli''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] negotiator that worked for [[President/Legends|President]] [[Gyr Keela]] at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. He was present at the negotiation of the [[Phantom Project|phantom cloaking device]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], where he served as one of the supervisors. During the negotiations, the phantom device was stolen by [[Gade Yedan]] and the [[Ante-Endor Association]], who had disguised themselves as members of the Alliance. The negotiations were cut short, and the rebel negotiator, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], was arrested pending a investigation.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] {{1st}}
